items.content:
About This Role

We are hiring a Senior Platform Engineer to build the internal developer platform that enables our engineering teams to ship faster and more reliably. You will design and build self-service tools, abstractions, and workflows that reduce friction and improve the developer experience across the organization.

This is a high-leverage role where your work multiplies the productivity of every engineer in the company. You will work on internal CLIs, deployment pipelines, environment provisioning, and service templates.

Responsibilities

  • Design and build internal developer tools and platform services
  • Create self-service workflows for environment provisioning, deployments, and service creation
  • Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines that are fast, reliable, and secure
  • Develop service templates and golden paths that encode best practices
  • Measure and improve developer experience metrics (deploy frequency, lead time, DORA metrics)
  • Provide guidance and support to product engineering teams on platform adoption

Requirements

  • 6+ years of software engineering experience with a focus on infrastructure or platform
  • Strong proficiency in Go, Python, or TypeScript
  • Deep experience with Kubernetes, Docker, and cloud-native architectures
  • Experience building internal tools, CLIs, or developer platforms
  • Excellent understanding of CI/CD, GitOps, and infrastructure-as-code

Nice to Have

  • Experience with Backstage, Port, or similar internal developer portals
  • Familiarity with platform engineering community practices and CNCF ecosystem
  • Experience with multi-tenant SaaS platform architecture
